    <h1 {...{
      "id": "using-the-composable-catalog-data-model-with-your-storefront"
    }}>{`Using the composable catalog data model with your storefront`}</h1>
    <p>{`Learn how a company with a single base catalog can use the composable catalog data model (CCDM) APIs to add product data, define catalogs using projections, and retrieve the catalog data for display in a headless storefront.`}</p>
    <p>{`This end-to-end use case demonstrates how a company with a single base catalog can use CCDM to:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Support products across two geographical markets and two distinct brands.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Enhance operational efficiency by avoiding duplication of product catalogs across multiple websites.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Control product visibility on websites based on geographical market and brand specifications.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <p>{`Before you begin, review `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "manage-catalogs.md"
      }}>{`set up and manage catalogs`}</a>{` to understand the channel and policy concepts.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "lets-get-started"
    }}>{`Let's get started`}</h2>
    <p>{`This use case demonstrates an end-to-end workflow for using CCDM based on the following components:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">
        <p parentName="li">{`One Channel`}</p>
        <p parentName="li">{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Company A`}</inlineCode>{` channel is linked to a single scope (locale: `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`en`}</inlineCode>{`) and two policies.`}</p>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ul">
        <p parentName="li">{`Two Policies`}</p>
        <ul parentName="li">
          <li parentName="ul">{`The `}<strong parentName="li">{`Location`}</strong>{` policy (`}<em parentName="li">{`Policy 1`}</em>{`) that defines the catalog projection for `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`locations`}</inlineCode>{`. This projection can be used to specify a target geographic market for selling specified SKUs. For example: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`UK`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`USA`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
          <li parentName="ul">{`The `}<strong parentName="li">{`Brand`}</strong>{` policy (`}<em parentName="li">{`Policy 2`}</em>{`) defines the catalog projection for `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`brands`}</inlineCode>{`. This projection can be used to specify one or more brands associated with each product SKU, for example `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Brand A`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Brand B`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
        </ul>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ul">
        <p parentName="li">{`Two products SKUs`}</p>
        <ul parentName="li">
          <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`Motor part 1`}</inlineCode>{` belongs to `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Brand A`}</inlineCode>{` and is aimed to be sold in `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`USA`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
          <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`Motor part 2`}</inlineCode>{` belongs to `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Brand B`}</inlineCode>{` and is aimed to be sold in `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`UK`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
          <li parentName="ul">{`The values for brand and location are product attributes of each SKU.`}</li>
          <li parentName="ul">{`The product specification does not include any `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Channel`}</inlineCode>{` or `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Policy`}</inlineCode>{` values. When retrieving products using the Storefront API, Channel and Policy values are passed in using API headers.`}</li>
        </ul>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ul">
        <p parentName="li">{`Storefront APIs`}</p>
        <ul parentName="li">
          <li parentName="ul">{`A catalog service API endpoint is used to represent how data will be retrieved using CCDM concepts.`}</li>
          <li parentName="ul">{`Pay close attention to the API headers. The CCDM concepts for filtering products using channels and policies are implemented through the API headers.`}</li>
          <li parentName="ul">{`Two Storefront API calls are represented:`}
            <ul parentName="li">
              <li parentName="ul">{`API Call one: Returns a SKU for `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Brand A`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`USA`}</inlineCode>{` combination.`}</li>
              <li parentName="ul">{`API Call two: Returns a SKU for `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Brand B`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`UK`}</inlineCode>{` combination.`}</li>
            </ul>
          </li>
        </ul>
      </li>
    </ul>
    <p>{`In the steps below, you use CCDM APIs to add the product, channel, and policy data to the SaaS data space for your project. Then, you use the the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "./admin/using-the-api.md"
      }}>{`Storefront API`}</a>{` to retrieve the data using the brand, and policy filters.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "step-1-add-products-to-your-catalog"
    }}>{`Step 1. Add products to your catalog`}</h2>
    <p>{`Add two simple products, "Motor Part 1" and "Motor Part 2", directly to Commerce SaaS data storage by submitting a `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://developer-stage.adobe.com/commerce/services/composable-catalog/data-ingestion/api-reference/#operation/ProductsPost"
      }}>{`createProducts`}</a>{` request using the Data Ingestion API.`}</p>
    <p>{`Send the product requests to the following endpoint:`}</p>
    <p><inlineCode parentName="p">{`POST commerce.adobe.io/feeds/products/api/v1/catalog/_environment_id`}</inlineCode></p>
    <p>{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`_environment_id`}</inlineCode>{` is the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://experienceleague.adobe.com/en/docs/commerce-merchant-services/user-guides/integration-services/saas#saasenv"
      }}>{`SaaS data space ID`}</a>{` where catalog services data is stored.`}</p>
    <p>{`Include the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://developer-stage.adobe.com/commerce/services/composable-catalog/data-ingestion/using-the-api/#headers"
      }}>{`required headers and path parameters`}</a>{` in the request.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "create-motor-part-1-product"
    }}>{`Create Motor Part 1 product`}</h3>
    <p>{`Add the simple product `}<em parentName="p">{`Motor Part 1`}</em>{` with two attribute codes, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Brand`}</inlineCode>{` set to `}<em parentName="p">{`Brand A`}</em>{`, and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Country`}</inlineCode>{` set to `}<em parentName="p">{`USA`}</em>{` by sending the following payload in the Create products request.`}</p>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Endpoint`}</strong></p>
    <p><inlineCode parentName="p">{`POST commerce.adobe.io/api/products/v1/catalog/_environment_id`}</inlineCode></p>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Headers`}</strong></p>
    <p>{`Include the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://developer-stage.adobe.com/commerce/services/composable-catalog/data-ingestion/using-the-api/#headers"
      }}>{`required headers and path parameters`}</a>{` in the request.`}</p>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Payload`}</strong></p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-json"
      }}>{`{
  "sku": "simple_product_1",
  "scope": {
    "locale": "en"
  },
  "name": "Motor Part 1",
  "slug": "motor-part",
  "status": "ENABLED",
  "description": "Motor part sold only in USA",
  "shortDescription": "motor part",
  "roles": [
    "SEARCH",
    "CATALOG"
  ],
  "metaTags": {
    "title": " ",
    "description": "SEO optimization",
    "keywords": [
      "motor",
      "part"
    ]
  },
  "attributes": [
    {
      "code": "Brand",
      "type": "STRING",
      "values": [
        "Brand A"
      ]
    },
    {
      "code": "Country",
      "type": "ARRAY",
      "values": [
        "USA"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "images": [
    {
      "url": "https://example.com",
      "label": "photo of my motor",
      "roles": [
        "PDP",
        "PLP"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "links": [
    {
      "sku": "motor-part",
      "type": "related"
    }
  ],
  "routes": [
    {
      "path": "motor-part"
    },
    {
      "path": "auto/motor-part",
      "position": 1
    }
  ]
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "create-motor-part-2-product"
    }}>{`Create Motor Part 2 product`}</h3>
    <p>{`Add the product `}<em parentName="p">{`Motor Part 2`}</em>{` with two attribute codes, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Brand`}</inlineCode>{` set to `}<em parentName="p">{`Brand B`}</em>{`, and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Country`}</inlineCode>{` set to `}<em parentName="p">{`UK`}</em>{` by sending the following payload in the createProducts request.`}</p>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Payload`}</strong></p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{

      }}>{`{

    <h2 {...{
      "id": "step-2-define-the-channel-and-policies"
    }}>{`Step 2. Define the channel and policies`}</h2>
    <p>{`In this step, create a channel for `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Company A`}</inlineCode>{` using the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://developer-stage.adobe.com/commerce/services/graphql-api/admin-api/index.html#definition-CreateChannelRequest"
      }}>{`CreateChannelRequest`}</a>{` GraphQL mutation from the Catalog Management API.`}</p>
    <p>{`Assign two policies to the channel: a `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Location Policy`}</inlineCode>{` with "USA" and "UK" as locations, and a `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Brand Policy`}</inlineCode>{` with "Brand A" and "Brand B".`}</p>
    <p>{`Send GraphQL requests for channels and policies to the following endpoint:`}</p>
    <p><inlineCode parentName="p">{`http://commerce.adobe.io/admin/graphql`}</inlineCode></p>
    <p>{`You must create the policies before you can assign them to a channel.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "create-policies"
    }}>{`Create policies`}</h3>
    <p>{`Use the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://developer-stage.adobe.com/commerce/services/graphql-api/admin-api/index.html#definition-CreatePolicyRequest"
      }}>{`createPolicy`}</a>{` GraphQL mutation from the Catalog Management API to define the location and brand policies.`}</p>
    <p>{`The query response returns a `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`PolicyId`}</inlineCode>{` value that is required when you assign the policy to a channel.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "location-policy"
    }}>{`Location policy`}</h4>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Request`}</strong></p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-graphql"
      }}>{`mutation CreatePolicy {
  createPolicy(policyRequest: {
    name: "Location policy",
    mandatory: true,
    actions: [
      {
        triggers: [
          {
            name: "AC-Policy-Country",
            transportType: HTTP_HEADER
          }
        ],
        filters: [
          {
            attribute: "country",
            valueSource: TRIGGER,
            value: "AC-Policy-Country",
            actionFilterOperator: EQUALS,
            enabled: true
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }) {
    name
    policyId
    mandatory
    actions {
      triggers {
        name
        transportType
      }
      filters {
        attribute
        valueSource
        value
        actionFilterOperator
        enabled
      }
    }
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Response`}</strong></p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-graphql"
      }}>{`{

    <h4 {...{

    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Request`}</strong></p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{

    <h3 {...{
      "id": "create-channel"
    }}>{`Create channel`}</h3>
    <p>{`Create a channel and assign the policies for location filtering and brand filtering. Use the policy IDs returned in the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`createPolicy`}</inlineCode>{` request to assign the policies.`}</p>
    <p>{`Pass the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://developer-stage.adobe.com/commerce/services/composable-catalog/admin/using-the-api/#headers"
      }}>{`required headers`}</a>{` for the request.`}</p>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Request`}</strong></p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-graphql"
      }}>{`mutation CreateChannel {
  createChannel(channelRequest: {
    name: "Company A",
    scopes: [
      {
        locale: "en"
      }
    ],
    policyIds: [
      "56a6908f-eyx3-59c3-sye8-574509e6y45","39c8106d-aab2-49b2-aac3-177608d4e56",
    ]
  }) {
    name
    policyIds
    scopes {
      locale
    }
  }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "step-4-retrieve-skus"
    }}>{`Step 4. Retrieve SKUs`}</h2>
    <p>{`Use the Storefront GraphQL API `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://developer-stage.adobe.com/commerce/services/graphql-api/storefront-api/index.html#query-productSearch"
      }}>{`productSearch`}</a>{` query to retrieve the SKUs you created.`}</p>
    <p>{`Send GraphQL requests for Storefront APIs to the following endpoints:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Sandbox: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`https://catalog-service-sandbox.adobe.io/graphql`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Production: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`https://catalog-service.adobe.io/graphql`}</inlineCode></li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "retrieve-sku-for-brand-a"
    }}>{`Retrieve SKU for Brand `}<inlineCode parentName="h3">{`A`}</inlineCode></h3>
    <p>{`Retrieve the SKU you created for `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Brand A`}</inlineCode>{` where location is `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`USA`}</inlineCode>{`. Use the search phrase `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Motor parts`}</inlineCode>{`, and specify a page size to limit results.`}</p>
    <p>{`The brand and location (`}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`AC-Policy-Brand`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`AC-Policy-Country`}</inlineCode>{`) are passed in using `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://developer-stage.adobe.com/commerce/services/composable-catalog/storefront-services/using-the-api/#header"
      }}>{`Storefront API headers`}</a>{`.`}</p>
    <p>{`The following lists the sample headers:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`Content-Type`}</inlineCode>{`: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`application/json`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`AC-Environment-Id`}</inlineCode>{`: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`123`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`Magento-Store-Code`}</inlineCode>{`: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`main_website_store`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`AC-Scope-Locale`}</inlineCode>{`: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`default`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`AC-Price-Book-Id`}</inlineCode>{`: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`base`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`AC-Channel-Id`}</inlineCode>{`: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`channelId-1`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`AC-Policy-State`}</inlineCode>{`: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`AC-Policy-Country`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`X-Api-Key`}</inlineCode>{`: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`***************`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`AC-Policy-Country`}</inlineCode>{`: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`USA`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`AC-Policy-Brand`}</inlineCode>{`: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Brand A`}</inlineCode></li>
    </ul>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "request"
    }}>{`Request`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-graphql"
      }}>{`query getProductSearchDetails(
  $filter: [SearchClauseInput!],
  $phrase: String!,
  $sort: [ProductSearchSortInput!],
  $pageSize: Int!
) {
  productSearch(
    phrase: $phrase,
    filter: $filter,
    sort: $sort,
    page_size: $pageSize
  ) {
    items {
      productView {
        sku
        name
        slug
        status
        images
        links
        attributes
        description
        shortDescription
        routes
        roles
        ... on SimpleProductView {
          price {
            final {
              amount {
                value
                currency
              }
            }
            regular {
              amount {
                value
                currency
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Here are the variable values to specify in the request:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-json"
      }}>{`{
  "phrase": "Motor parts",
  "filter": [],
  "sort": [],
  "pageSize": 100
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "response"
    }}>{`Response`}</h4>
    <p>{`The response returns the product details for a single SKU, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Motor Part 1`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</p>

        "className": "language-graphql"
      }}>{`{

`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "retrieve-sku-for-brand-b"
    }}>{`Retrieve SKU for Brand B`}</h3>
    <p>{`Retrieve the SKU you created for `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Brand B`}</inlineCode>{` where location is `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`UK`}</inlineCode>{`. Use the search phrase `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Motor parts`}</inlineCode>{`, and specify a page size to limit results.`}</p>
    <p>{`The brand and location (`}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`AC-Policy-Brand`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`AC-Policy-Country`}</inlineCode>{`) are passed in using the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://developer-stage.adobe.com/commerce/services/composable-catalog/storefront-services/using-the-api/#header"
      }}>{`Storefront API headers`}</a>{`.`}</p>
    <p>{`The following lists the sample headers:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`Content-Type`}</inlineCode>{`: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`application/json`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`AC-Environment-Id`}</inlineCode>{`: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`123`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`Magento-Store-Code`}</inlineCode>{`: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`main_website_store`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`AC-Scope-Locale`}</inlineCode>{`: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`default`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`AC-Price-Book-Id`}</inlineCode>{`: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`base`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`AC-Channel-Id`}</inlineCode>{`: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`channelId-1`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`AC-Policy-State`}</inlineCode>{`: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`AC-Policy-Brand`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`X-Api-Key`}</inlineCode>{`: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`search_gql`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`AC-Policy-Brand`}</inlineCode>{`: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Brand B`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`AC-Policy-Country`}</inlineCode>{`: `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`UK`}</inlineCode></li>
    </ul>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "request-1"
    }}>{`Request`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-graphql"
      }}>{`query getProductSearchDetails(
  $filter: [SearchClauseInput!],
  $phrase: String!,
  $sort: [ProductSearchSortInput!],
  $pageSize: Int!
) {
  productSearch(
    phrase: $phrase,
    filter: $filter,
    sort: $sort,
    page_size: $pageSize
  ) {
    items {
      productView {
        sku
        name
        images
        links
        attributes
        description
        shortDescription
        routes
        roles
        ... on SimpleProductView {
          price {
            final {
              amount {
                value
                currency
              }
            }
            regular {
              amount {
                value
                currency
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Here are the variables specified in the request:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-json"
      }}>{`{
  "phrase": "Motor parts",
  "filter": [],
  "sort": [],
  "pageSize": 100
}
`}</code></pre>
